snippet.title: اليونق و راندر - ايش دا الزفت ALYOUNG & RANDAR - esh da alzeft ( official music video)  Remix
snippet.description:
للاشتراك في القناة | https://shorturl.at/arR29

Remix still cup that shit

DIRECTED BY
Renad Alzahrani 

CINEMATOGRAPHY BY
Abdulrahman
Renad Alzahrani 

PRODUCED BY 
Dalia

EDITED & COLOR GRADING 
MohFlame 

PRODUCTION DESIGNER
Jore Bajunaid

PROD BY
Aldeepmusic

GAFFER 
Radwan 
Mohammed 

MIXING AND MASTERING BY
Lord

BEAT 
Deep Side 

GRAFFITI & TYPOGRAPHY 
Joker

كلمات 
اليونق و راند 
اللحان 
ديب سايد

كلمات الأغنية 
عشنا وشربنا الهم في الكاسات 
زرعنا الامل تحت الارض طلع لنا الشقى جوه الفاضات 
يتزين لنا وكأنو ما شاف زينا ينشف مدمن على رينا 
يحب يشوفنا في حالة شتات 
Look 
العقل صلّب لين اصابنا block 
والناس تحب الثرثره ودّك ترميهم ببلوك ' الي هوا الطوب ' 
يحبو الجدل وانا اسك طفشت ما احب اعك 
وزي ما قال الملهم كلو بيتعالج بشُّك 
مين اتزوج مين اطلق مين الي كبر واتألق 
مين الي في مكانو علّق يحسدو الطير إن حلّق 
ضوضاء كرّهت ديني الاضواء 
ف سرت مطّر اني اتعايش مغ الغباء 
لو ما تشبههم منتا منهم تنجح تلقى انك غابنهم
احمد ربي الرّزق بيدي الخالق مو مقسم منهم 
ولا كُنا ولّينا وفي دوجا الليل غنينا 
سرا الليل يا عبيد ونحنا لسا ما سرينا 
-
يا ابويا ايش دا لزفت 
شايف 
يا ابويا ايش دا الزفت 
بالله شايف 
يا ابويا ايش دا الزفت 
كل ما اقول ممكن يتغيرو القاهم زي الزفت 
فهمني 
يا ابويا ايش دا لزفت 
شايف 
يا ابويا ايش دا الزفت 
بالله شايف 
يا ابويا ايش دا الزفت 
كل ما اقول ممكن يتغيرو القاهم زي الزفت 
فهمني 
-
احاول اصلح من نفسي احاول اكون احسن 
بس في الدنيا ملاعين يعني اجباري اكون العن
مو عيب انك تحس بالضعف عيب انك تتمسكن
و الحياه ماهي سعيده قد ما حتفرج حتحزن
عيب انك تقول شي عارف انك ما حتطولو
يا تكون قد الكلام ولا كلامك ليش تقولو
طبيعي يزعل عايش احلامه محقق طموحو
و القوي ما يستسلم الا لو طلعت روحو
اكتب أبيات تفتح بيوت 
عندي سلبيات و عندي عيوب 
أنا الشمس راح يجي الشروق لو طال الغروب 
لو اني خسرت معارك راح افوز كل الحروب
عارف نفسي انا مين مايهم راي الصحافه 
دايما رقم واحد ما أتشرف بالوصافه
لا ترمي نفسك في قمامه وتزعل من الوصاخه 
والقلم اداء جريمة يصنف اله حاده

#ايش_دا_الزفت

‎‏Follow the artists:
‎‏ ALYOUNG
‎‏https://www.instagram.com/alyoung187
‎‏https://www.snapchat.com/add/alyoungofficial
‎‏https://twitter.com/alyoung187

Connect with RANDAR
https://www.instagram.com/randarofficial
https://www.snapchat.com/add/randarofficial
https://twitter.com/randarofficil 


Management & Booking:

snippet.title: Rama | Namit Malhotra’s Ramayana | Nitesh Tiwari | Ranbir, Yash, Hans Zimmer & A.R. Rahman
snippet.description:
Rama is the greatest of all time because he lived a life where the choices he made were always in the benefit of the greater good, duty over desire, and sacrifice over self. 

His legacy continues to enhance and empower humanity over time and bring the belief in the goodness of the human spirit to resolve all conflict and bring peace to the world. 

Namit Malhotra’s Ramayana 
Directed by Nitesh Tiwari 

In cinemas worldwide
Ramayana Part 1 🏹
Diwali 2026

---------------------------------------------------

Namit Malhotra’s Ramayana
Our Truth. Our History.

Starring: 
Ranbir Kapoor as Rama 
Yash as Ravana 
Sai Pallavi as Sita 
Ravie Dubey as Lakshman 
Sunny Deol as Hanuman

Co-Produced by Yash
Written by Shridhar Raghavan
Directed by Nitesh Tiwari

Music by Hans Zimmer & A.R. Rahman
Lyrics by Kumar Vishwas

VFX by DNEG (8-time Academy Award winner)

Filmed for IMAX

Presented by Prime Focus Studios in association with Monster Mind Creations

Audio on Sony Music Entertainment India Pvt. Ltd (C) 2026

هو أنا لو جنبك ايه هينقصني وهحتاجه

ده أنا فيك لقيت
نفسي عشان

وأنسى اللي فات
وأعيش أمان

خليني قصاد عينيك
ده انا بين ايديك
بنسى الكلام

جنبك بعيش
عمري في سلام

متسيبش ايديا وخليك جنبي وطمني
خليك دايما أكتر حد قريب مني
لو مرة زعلنا تعالي احكيلي وفهمني

snippet.title: Aakhri Sawal Teaser | Yeh Sirf Shuruaat Hai | Sanjay Dutt | Namashi | Amit Sadh | Sameera Reddy
snippet.description:
What happens when a question isn’t just a question… but a weapon?
Aakhri Sawal follows Vicky, a brilliant yet volatile scholar, who ignites a nationwide controversy by publicly accusing his mentor, the legendary Professor Gopal Nadkarni, of institutional bias. What begins as an academic dispute soon spirals into a televised intellectual battlefield, fueled by media sensationalism and political agendas.
As the debate intensifies, it transforms into a psychological chess match. Vicky isn’t just debating history… he’s hunting for the truth. From the Gandhi assassination to the Emergency, no topic is off-limits.
But beneath the chaos lies a deeper mystery.
Jab sawaal sach se takraata hai… toh awaaz desh bhar mein goonjti hai.
#AakhriSawalTeaser Out Now!

Get ready to know the answer on 8th May only in cinemas.

Why is Vicky really doing this?
As secrets from the past begin to surface, Vicky prepares to ask his “Aakhri Sawal” — a question that has nothing to do with politics, but everything to do with a buried truth that could change everything.
The Question India Never Stopped Asking.

Cast
Sanjay Dutt as Professor Gopal Nadkarni
Namashi Chakraborty as Vicky Hegde
Amit Sadh as Aditya Rao
Sameera Reddy as Professor Pallavi Menon
Neetu Chandra as Kavya Rawat

Mrinal Kulkarni as Prabha Nadkarni
Harsimran Oberoi as Ipshita Das
Rockey Raina as Sohraab

Nikhil Nanda as M.S. Golwalkar

snippet.title: Last Meadow Online | Official Announcement Trailer | Discord
snippet.description:
Available now on Discord desktop and browser: https://discord.com/last-meadow-online

After a harrowing adventure through flourishing forests, desolate deserts, and punishing plains, Wumpus has finally achieved physical contact with The Last Meadow. As they return to town to bask in their accomplishment, the celebration is cut short by a new emerging threat, a fearsome, foliage-absorbing dragon who goes by: Grass Toucher. 

Today, we’re announcing the next entry in Big Wump Games’ beloved, now quintuple-A gaming franchise: Last Meadow Online. Band together with your fellow Discordians in the world’s first DBMMIRPG* and help Wumpus defeat Grass Toucher.

All players who contribute to defeating the dragon will receive a limited-edition badge on their Discord profile, yours to keep. But you'll need to act fast: Last Meadow Online is only available until April 7. Wumpus needs all the help they can get.

Learn more in our blog: https://discord.com/blog/last-meadow-online-announcement

_*Discord-Based Massively Multiplayer Incremental Role Playing Game :)_

snippet.title: Diamond Platnumz ft Jux - JOY (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
Stream & Download JOY👇👇👇
https://dplatnumz.lnk.to/joy

After the massive success of Enjoy, Diamond Platnumz and @africanboyJUX  link up once again—this time turning “ENJOY” into pure JOY. The song carries a carefree message about living in the moment, letting go of stress, and choosing happiness no matter what life throws your way. With playful melodies and uplifting energy, the duo remind listeners that life is short, tomorrow is never guaranteed, and sometimes the best thing you can do is dance, celebrate, and create your own happiness.
